title: Cycle 3: OOS backtest FNO_large
interpretation: FNO_large vol-targeting beats B&H on SPY (+22%) and XLK (+37%) on the 2025+ OOS test (n=377 days, 10% target vol). Other assets are roughly tied or slightly negative. The FNO doesn't help on every asset, but for SPY and XLK the improvement is substantial. GLD is a loss because gold went up a lot in 2025 (B&H Sharpe 1.94 is hard to beat). XLE is a loss because energy rallied in 2025.
